headline: Model Context Protocol breaks out as Google Cloud anchors a wave of agent-native data tooling.
body: Google Cloud detailed Model Context Protocol integrations across its data stack, pairing the Agent Development Kit with Gemini CLI, Claude Code, and Codex for data agents, alongside AI-native databases offering natural language interfaces and multimodal queries and hybrid full-text plus vector search in Spanner. Vector database, Kubernetes, noSQL, and Gemini all lead the rotation as agent infrastructure consolidates around durable context. Separately, multiple AI Engineer talks reframe agents around persistence: Omnara argues the session log is the agent, Nx flags memory gaps in coding agents, and Meta Superintelligence Labs lays out continuous evaluation pipelines measuring tool use and drift. Reporting on Anthropic's Fable and Mythos ties government-forced model removals to frontier capability and export-control pressure.

cited_items.title: A Genius With Amnesia - Victor Savkin, Nx
The Log Is The Agent - Ishaan Sehgal, Omnara
Production Evals For Agentic AI Systems - Nishant Gupta, Meta Superintelligence Labs
Anthropic's Labs Lead On Fable's Capabilities + Building AI-Native Products — With Mike Krieger
